requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant handling and R-600a documentation baseline

summary.en: Malaysia-facing documentation should explicitly support R-600a use where applicable, including charge quantity control, safety labeling, leak response instructions, and service manual disclosure for flammable refrigerants. The target market treatment is aligned with Malaysian adopted safety standards for refrigerant performance and risk controls under MS IEC frameworks.
summary.zh: 马来西亚对R-600a机型应有面向目的地的完整说明，包含制冷剂充注量控制、警示标签、泄漏处理和维修手册披露等，且与MS IEC体系下的安全和风险控制要求一致。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞對R-600a機型應有面向目的地的完整說明，包含制冷劑充注量控制、警示標籤、洩漏處理和維修手冊披露等，且與MS IEC體系下的安全與風險控制要求一致。

standards_or_laws: MS IEC 60335-2-24 refrigerant handling and appliance safety clauses for flammable media
Malaysia safety evidence framework for household refrigerating appliances

summary.en: China documentation for household refrigerators generally references GB 4706.13 and related GB/T energy and safety baselines while applying domestic refrigerant handling practices and service documentation standards. Those records support technical review but are not destination-complete for Malaysia.
summary.zh: 中国家用冰箱常以GB 4706.13及相关GB/T能效体系为依据，配套本土制冷剂处理与维修要求。其文件可用于技术评估基础，但不足以构成马来西亚目的地完整证明。
summary.zht: 中國家用冰箱常以GB 4706.13及相關GB/T能效體系為依據，配套本土製冷劑處理與維修要求。其文件可作為技術評估基礎，但不足以構成馬來西亞目的地完整證明。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — Electrical safety for household appliances
GB 12021.2 — Energy labelling and efficiency baseline for household refrigerators

gap.en: If China files use a different refrigerant declaration format or omit Malaysia-specific flammable-media handling notes, Malaysia-facing gaps remain. Exporters should add Malaysia-safe charge, leak, servicing and user warning documentation for R-600a models and keep the user manual consistent with local importer language expectations.
gap.zh: 若中国文件采用不同的制冷剂声明格式或未补充马来西亚需关注的可燃媒介处理说明，则仍存在目的地缺口。对于R-600a机型，需补充马来西亚语境下的充注量、泄漏、检修和用户警示文件，并保持说明书与责任方要求一致。
gap.zht: 若中國文件採用不同的製冷劑聲明格式或未補充馬來西亞需要關注的可燃介質處理說明，則仍存在目的地缺口。對於R-600a機型，需補充馬來西亞語境下的充注量、洩漏、檢修和用戶警示文件，並保持說明書與責任方要求一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for product documentation completeness where flammable refrigerants are used and market-facing safety records are required by local implementation bodies.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China domestic channels where GB safety/environmental filing applies; not equivalent in scope to Malaysia destination documentation requirements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is typically aligned with low-GWP positioning, but Malaysia-facing documentation still requires destination-compliant refrigerant handling disclosures and safety notice language. Use China GB dossiers as technical evidence only and close the Malaysia documentation gap before customs-linked placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a常具有低GWP优势，但马来西亚仍要求目的地可燃制冷剂处理、泄漏和安全警示文件闭环。中国档案可作为技术证据，需在马来西亚入场前补齐目的地文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a常具有低GWP優勢，但馬來西亞仍要求目的地可燃製冷劑處理、泄漏和安全警示文件閉環。中國檔案可作為技術證據，需在馬來西亞入場前補齊目的地文件。
